description: Official Tsuki parser template index. The app checks this file at startup and pulls any template the user doesn't have locally.

templates.name: Madara
templates.description: WordPress Madara theme — covers 500+ sites including MangaKakalot clones, Asura mirrors, and most popular English scanlation WordPress installs.

templates.name: MangaThemesia
templates.description: MangaThemesia WordPress child theme used by sites like Reaperscans, Asuracomic, and other modern scanlation groups.

templates.name: MangaStream
templates.description: WPManga / MangaStream theme — classic WordPress manga theme used by Toonily, MangaStream mirrors, and similar sites.

templates.name: ZeistManga
templates.description: Blogger/Blogspot-based manga sites using the Atom JSON feed. Works on MangaSoul, LonerTL, and 50+ Indonesian/Spanish/Arabic scanlation blogs.

templates.name: Keyoapp
templates.description: Keyoapp scanlation CMS — modern Tailwind-based platform used by AsuraScans, FingerScans, Luminous Scans, and 12+ English groups.

templates.name: HeanCms
templates.description: HeanCms JSON REST API platform — used by ReaperScans, FlameScans, VoidScans. API served from api.{domain}.

templates.name: Madtheme
templates.description: Madtheme Bootstrap manga theme — used by MangaKomi, Zinmanga, and 10 other aggregators.
